scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync,writeFileSync} from 'node:fs'; const js='dist/index.js'; writeFileSync(js,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+readFileSync(js,'utf8')); const sm=JSON.parse(readFileSync('dist/index.js.map','utf8')); sm.mappings=';'+sm.mappings; writeFileSync('dist/index.js.map',JSON.stringify(sm));" && chmod +x dist/index.js
